message:
test: expand inline tests to 30 in output_gate, keymap, ftui_compat, anthropic_auth, google_auth

All five modules were below the 30-test threshold. Added tests for:
- output_gate: GatePhase Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq, TuiAwareWriter flush/suspended/length
- keymap: timeline bindings, view_scope, action_label completeness
- ftui_compat: Area::split_top edge cases, StyleSpec defaults
- anthropic_auth: failure kind debug, success serialization, selectors
- google_auth: failure kind debug, elapsed roundtrip, artifacts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
